title_jp: 酒と料理のマリアージュ
title_en: Sake and Food Pairing: A Guide
subtitle: How to match different styles of sake with dishes.
body:
Unlike wine, sake’s savoury umami and low acidity allow it to complement a wide range of cuisines. Light, fragrant daiginjo pairs well with delicate sashimi, while rich junmai stands up to grilled meats and cheese.

This guide explores the basic principles: match flavour intensity, consider regional pairings, and experiment with contrasting elements.
